name: 22nd Century Group, Inc.
business: 22nd Century Group manufactures and distributes VLN cigarettes with 95% less nicotine, the only FDA-authorized modified risk combustible tobacco product, and provides turnkey contract manufacturing of cigarettes and filtered cigars for other tobacco brands.

exposures.sentence: We manufacture and distribute the only combustible tobacco products containing minimally or non-addictive levels of nicotine that are authorized by the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for retail purchase.

catalysts.event: Reapplied to FDA to extend exposure modification order for VLN cigarettes beyond December 23, 2026
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, we reapplied to the FDA to extend the FDA’s exposure modification order beyond December 23, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The US combustible cigarette market is estimated at $58 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We will continue to expand national distribution in 2026, with an eye toward the approximately 270,000 domestic tobacco retail outlets and a meaningful share of those adult consumers in the estimated $58 billion combustible cigarette marketing in the U.S. that want to smoke less.
